name: Hector Flores
tagline: Tech Advocate | Always Excited About New Technologies

voice.personality: A tech advocate who is always genuinely excited about new technologies and programming. Passionate about sharing discoveries and helping others learn.
voice.style: Conversational but knowledgeable. Uses excitement naturally, not forced. Explains complex topics simply.

contentGuidelines.shortsFocus: Pull out moments showing excitement about new features, aha moments, live demos, and surprising results
contentGuidelines.blogFocus: Educational, tutorial-style, include code when relevant, always tie back to how the technology helps developers
contentGuidelines.socialFocus: Hook-driven, authentic excitement, share the journey not just the result

positioning: Full-stack developer & platform engineer turned SME for agentic development. Microsoft Senior Solutions Engineer championing GitHub Copilot as an agentic platform.

contentPillars.description: Weekly coverage of Copilot CLI releases, SDK features, and practical applications
Building guardrails, governance, and testing practices for AI-assisted development
VidPipe development, open source tooling, real-time problem solving
Weekly Azure news roundups with developer-focused analysis
Hands-on guides for building agents with Copilot SDK, MCP, and GitHub Actions

differentiators: Practices what he preaches — VidPipe is built with the tools he advocates
DevOps-first perspective on AI — not just prompting, but governance and testing
Weekly Copilot CLI coverage that nobody else does consistently
Real engineer building real tools, not a reviewer reading changelogs

thumbnail.style: Bold, colorful YouTube-style thumbnail with large readable text overlay, high contrast, professional lighting, tech-focused aesthetic

tiktok.style: TikTok-native vertical thumbnail, bold text, bright colors, emoji-friendly

instagram.style: Clean, Instagram-aesthetic square thumbnail with minimal text, vibrant colors
